---
title: "Contact"
---

## Contact

• Email: yusufkurniaromadhon@gmail.com  
• LinkedIn: Yusuf Kurnia Romadhon  
• GitHub: yusufkurniar  

I am open to opportunities in data analytics, business intelligence, and data science roles.  
Feel free to reach out for collaboration, discussion, or opportunities.

## Location

Melbourne, Australia  
Open to opportunities in Dubai, Malaysia, and Indonesia after graduation
